positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial forest, featuring bioluminescent, oversized flora (like glowing ferns and trumpet-shaped flowers) growing around the silhouette of a crescent moon and stars. The composition should be centered, symmetrical, and highly stylized in a neo-art deco, flat illustration style. Use strong contrast between deep indigo and midnight blue backgrounds and vibrant, electric neon accents of turquoise, magenta, and lime green for the glowing elements. Focus on clean linework, crisp edges, and a decorative, repeating pattern quality suitable for apparel repeat printing. Vector art style, graphic design, ethereal, mystical.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, low resolution, grainy, noisy, poor composition, messy, abstract, realistic photography, photo-realistic, bad anatomy, extra limbs
